title: Iteiluma leptostylidifolia
taxonomy: Iteiluma leptostylidifolia is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Aizoaceae. Within the family Aizoaceae, it is classified under the subfamily Ruschioideae. Further classification places it in the tribe Ruschieae. It is also known by its synonym, Ruschia leptostylidifolia.
